app.name: BaziLens
app.tagline: Scholarly insights for the modern era.

chart.name: Name (optional)
chart.birthTimeHint: A precise time produces a more accurate chart.
chart.useTrueSolar: I know the exact time (enable true-solar correction)

upgrade.title: Upgrade Plans
upgrade.subtitle: Unlock deeper scholarly insights and advanced Bazi chart analyses.
upgrade.oneTimeReportBody: A comprehensive, beautifully typeset 20-page document analyzing your lifetime pillars.

faq.refundA: We offer a 7-day scholarly review period. If the insights do not meet your expectations, a full refund will be provided upon request.
faq.cancelQ: How do I cancel my subscription?
faq.cancelA: Cancellations can be managed directly through your account settings at any time. Your access will continue until the end of the current billing cycle.

account.title: Account
account.subtitle: Manage your profile, preferences, and subscription.
account.deleteWarning: Permanently remove your account and all associated Bazi readings. This action cannot be undone.

cookie.intro: We use cookies to deliver our services, analyze usage and improve your experience.

landing.subtitle: 读懂你的八字
landing.blurb: Scholarly insights for the modern era. Decode the ancient algorithms of your life with precision and elegance.
landing.feat1Body: Rooted in authentic traditional texts. Our engine accurately calculates the Four Pillars with rigorous scholarly precision, avoiding superficial interpretations.
landing.feat2Body: Leveraging advanced natural language processing to synthesize complex pillar interactions, providing nuanced, readable insights tailored to your specific chart.
landing.feat3Body: Generate beautifully formatted, editorial-quality PDF reports. Perfect for archival study or professional consultation, designed to look like a printed manuscript.

signIn.title: Sign in to BaziLens
signIn.subtitle: Access your scholarly analytical tools.
signIn.agreeAge: I confirm I am 16 years of age or older.
signIn.magicLinkSent: Magic link sent to {{email}}. Check your inbox within 10 minutes.
signIn.errorRequired: Please enter your email and confirm both checkboxes.

footer.copyright: © {{year}} BaziLens. Scholarly insights for the modern era.

tickets.title: Ticket Queue
tickets.subtitle: Manage and prioritize user inquiries regarding Bazi chart interpretations, technical issues, and account status.

error.boundaryBody: An unexpected error occurred while rendering this page. The team has been notified.

onboarding.welcomeBody: Pick your language and consent preferences. You can change these any time in Settings.
onboarding.quickBody: Just a few details to compute your Four Pillars. You can refine birth place and exact time later.
onboarding.sampleBody: Below is what an AI reading looks like for your chart. Tap Start Reading to generate the real one.
onboarding.samplePreview: Your day master is supported by month branch, suggesting a stable career foundation. Recent annual stems indicate gradual upward momentum, especially in autumn months. Watch for opportunities through senior mentors.

disclaimer.footer: BaziLens is a traditional Chinese astrology study and reference tool offered for educational and entertainment purposes only. It does not constitute medical, legal, financial, investment, or psychological advice.
